task: Implement and validate a bivariate Hawkes process estimator with O(N) recursive exponential-kernel MLE and generate a formatted Excel report for a quant-trading client, then handle follow-up review feedback.
goal_notes: The collection captures retraced session activity anchored to the visible conversation history and known repository artifacts, including the initial Hawkes deliverable and subsequent corrective user feedback.
learning: For retraced engineering sessions, anchor every step to verifiable artifacts (commits, files, test commands, and user messages) and avoid inventing hidden intermediate actions.
